mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '30' THEN '货转' WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '50' THEN '混配' when TBCI.SOURCE = '20' then '集港' when tbci.SOURCE = '10' then '卸船' ELSE COALESCE(TBCI.IS_TOS, CASE WHEN TBT.TYPE = '拆箱集港' THEN '集港' ELSE TBT.TYPE END) END FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBCI.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID WHERE TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TDSI.ID, TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TDSI.TRADE_TYPE, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDSI.COMPANY_ID, TDSI.COMPANY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_NUM, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID, TDSI.CUSTOMER_NAME, TDSI.CONTACTS, TDSI.SHIP_PHONE, TDSI.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDSI.REMARK, TDSI.CREATE_BY, TDSI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.CREATE_TIME, TDSI.UPDATE_BY, TDSI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.UPDATE_TIME, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDSI.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID_NEW, TDSI.IS_TOS, TDSI.ID, TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TDSI.TRADE_TYPE, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDSI.COMPANY_ID, TDSI.COMPANY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_NUM, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID, TDSI.CUSTOMER_NAME, TDSI.CONTACTS, TDSI.SHIP_PHONE, TDSI.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDSI.REMARK, TDSI.CREATE_BY, TDSI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.CREATE_TIME, TDSI.UPDATE_BY, TDSI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.UPDATE_TIME, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDSI.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID_NEW, TDSI.IS_TOS FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT, TEMP.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP ON TBCI.ID = TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE, TRANSFER_DATE, YSPHH, JSZT, TOS_CARGO_ID, CDH, IS_TOS, MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, REAL_CLEAR_DATE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_CODE, STOREHOUSE_ID, REGION_ID, MASS_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, MIX_WEIGHT, MIX_TIME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBH.ID, TBH.TYPE, TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID, TBH.TRUST_ID, TBH.TRUST_CARGO_ID, TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBH.SHIP_NAME, TBH.TRADE_TYPE, TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD, TBH.CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBH.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBH.CARGO_AGENT_ID, TBH.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, TBH.CARGO_CODE, TBH.CARGO_NAME, TBH.QUANTITY, TBH.TON, TBH.TICKET_NUM, TBH.STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, TBH.STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TBH.REMARK, TBH.CREATE_BY, TBH.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME CREATE_TIME, TBH.UPDATE_BY, TBH.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBH.UPDATE_TIME, TBH.VOYAGE, TBH.CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, TBH.CONTRACT_CODE, TBH.PRE_WEIGHT, TBH.VOLUME_TON FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH left join T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI on TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBH.TYPE = '1' AND TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD = '装' AND TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TDSI.ID, TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TDSI.TRADE_TYPE, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDSI.COMPANY_ID, TDSI.COMPANY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_NUM, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID, TDSI.CUSTOMER_NAME, TDSI.CONTACTS, TDSI.SHIP_PHONE, TDSI.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDSI.REMARK, TDSI.CREATE_BY, TDSI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.CREATE_TIME, TDSI.UPDATE_BY, TDSI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.UPDATE_TIME, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDSI.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID_NEW, TDSI.IS_TOS, TBCI.REAL_CLEAR_DATE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC ON TBCI.ID = TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBT.TYPE = '装船' AND TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBT.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TDSI.ID, TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TDSI.TRADE_TYPE, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDSI.COMPANY_ID, TDSI.COMPANY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_NUM, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID, TDSI.CUSTOMER_NAME, TDSI.CONTACTS, TDSI.SHIP_PHONE, TDSI.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDSI.REMARK, TDSI.CREATE_BY, TDSI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.CREATE_TIME, TDSI.UPDATE_BY, TDSI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.UPDATE_TIME, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDSI.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID_NEW, TDSI.IS_TOS, TBCI.REAL_CLEAR_DATE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT, TEMP.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('疏港', '陆销')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('疏港', '陆销')) TEMP ON TBCI.ID = TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE, TRANSFER_DATE, YSPHH, JSZT, TOS_CARGO_ID, CDH, IS_TOS, MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, REAL_CLEAR_DATE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentCargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TBCMR.MIX_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') "mixDate", SUM(TBCMD.MIX_WEIGHT) "mixWeight" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL TBCMD ON TBCMR.ID = TBCMD.MIX_RECORD_ID WHERE TBCMD.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TBCMR.MIX_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT ID, TYPE, CARGO_INFO_ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, TICKET_NUM, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, VOYAGE, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, PRE_WEIGHT, VOLUME_TON, CHARGE_STATUS, IS_TOS, TOS_CARGO_INFO_NO FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST WHERE TYPE = '1' AND LOAD_UNLOAD = '卸' AND CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

WITH SOURCE AS (SELECT TBCI.ID, CASE WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '30' THEN '货转' WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '50' THEN '混配' when TBCI.SOURCE = '20' then '集港' when tbci.SOURCE = '10' then '卸船' ELSE COALESCE(TBCI.IS_TOS, CASE WHEN TBT.TYPE = '拆箱集港' THEN '集港' ELSE TBT.TYPE END) END "source" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBCI.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID) SELECT TBC.ID, TBC.CONTACT_NO "contractNo", TBCR.ID "contractRateId", DECODE(SOURCE."source", '货转', GREATEST(TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE, 0), '混配', TBCI.MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) "freeStorageDays", TBCR.RATE, TBCR.TAX, SFB.FILE_ID FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN SOURCE ON TBCI.ID = SOURCE.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, MIN(TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT) "minWeighOutDt" FROM (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) WEIGH_JG ON TBCI.ID = WEIGH_JG.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR ON TBCI.ID = TBCMR.CARGO_INFO_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY TBCC ON TBCI.COMPANY_ID = TBCC.COMPANY_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON (TBC.STATUS = '20' AND TBCC.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID AND TBCI.COMPANY_ID = TBCC.COMPANY_ID AND TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = TBC.CUSTOMER_ID AND
to_date(to_char(#{date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd') >= to_date(to_char(TBC.START_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd') AND to_date(to_char(#{date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd') <= to_date(to_char(TBC.END_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd')
to_date(to_char(CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END ,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd')>= to_date(to_char(TBC.START_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd') AND to_date(to_char(CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END ,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd')<= to_date(to_char(TBC.END_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd')
) JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON (TBCR.TYPE = '10' AND TBCR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = 'MS00240' AND TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID AND TBCI.CARGO_CODE = TBCR.CARGO_CODE) LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON TBC.ID = SFB.BUSINESS_ID WHERE TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY TBC.CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT TCSSD.ID, TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID, TCSSD."DATE", TCSSD.TON, TCSSD.BILLABLE_TON, TCSSD.IN_TON, TCSSD.OUT_TON, TCSSD.AMOUNT, TCSSD.TAX_AMOUNT FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL TCSSD JOIN T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS ON TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID = TCSS.ID WHERE TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY "DATE"

SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, PAYMENT_DAYS, RATE, TAX, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TYPE, RATE_ID, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TRATE_ITEM_ID, TRATE_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, REDUCE_TYPE, REDUCE_DAYS, REDUCE_END_DATE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_STACK_FEE_REDUCE WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_INFO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, CONTRACT_ID, RATE, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, AMOUNT, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, REVIEW_BY, REVIEW_BY_NAME, REVIEW_BY_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, IS_USE_REDUCE, IS_FINAL, REDUCE_AMOUNT,reduce_type) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{freeStorageDays, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{startDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reviewByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewByTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{contractRateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{isUseReduce, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isFinal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reduceAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{reduceType, jdbcType=DECIMAL})

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL(ID, STORAGE_SETTLE_ID, "DATE", TON, BILLABLE_TON, IN_TON, OUT_TON, AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT) VALUES (#{detail.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.storageSettleId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.date, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{detail.ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.billableTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.inTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.outTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL});

mapper.select: SELECT TCSS.ID "tcssId", TCSS.COMPANY_ID "tcssCompanyId", TCSS.COMPANY_NAME "tcssCompanyName", TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID "tcssShipvoyageId", TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID "tcssShipvoyageItemId", TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_ID "tcssCargoOwnerId", TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "tcssCargoOwnerName", TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID "tcssCargoInfoId", TCSS.HANDOVERLIST_ID "tcssHandoverlistId", TCSS.CONTRACT_ID "tcssContractId", TCSS.RATE "tcssRate", TCSS.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS "tcssFreeStorageDays", TCSS.AMOUNT "tcssAmount", TCSS.START_DATE "tcssStartDate", TCSS.END_DATE "tcssEndDate", TCSS.STATUS "tcssStatus", TCSS.REVIEW_BY "tcssReviewBy", TCSS.REVIEW_BY_NAME "tcssReviewByName", TCSS.REVIEW_BY_TIME "tcssReviewByTime", TCSS.CREATE_BY "tcssCreateBy", TCSS.CREATE_BY_NAME "tcssCreateByName", TCSS.CREATE_TIME "tcssCreateTime", TCSS.UPDATE_BY "tcssUpdateBy", TCSS.UPDATE_BY_NAME "tcssUpdateByName", TCSS.UPDATE_TIME "tcssUpdateTime", TCSS.CONTRACT_RATE_ID "tcssContractRateId", TCSS.TAX "tcssTax", TCSS.TAX_AMOUNT "tcssTaxAmount", TCSS.IS_USE_REDUCE "tcssIsUseReduce", TCSS.IS_FINAL "tcssIsFinal", TCSS.REDUCE_AMOUNT "tcssReduceAmount", TCSSD.ID "tcssdId", TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID "tcssdStorageSettleId", TCSSD."DATE" "tcssdDate", TCSSD.TON "tcssdTon", TCSSD.BILLABLE_TON "tcssdBillableTon", TCSSD.IN_TON "tcssdInTon", TCSSD.OUT_TON "tcssdOutTon", TCSSD.AMOUNT "tcssdAmount", TCSSD.TAX_AMOUNT "tcssdTaxAmount", TBC.CONTACT_NO "tbcContractNo", DECODE(TCSS.STATUS, '10', '1', TCS.STATUS) "tcsdStatus", DECODE(TCSS.STATUS, '10', '已结算', DECODE(TCS.STATUS, '30', '计费审核', '31', '商务确认', '40', '部分开票', '50', '已开票')) "tcsdStatementStatusLabel", TCS.ID TCS_ID FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS JOIN T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL TCSSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TCSS.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSD.BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCSD.STATEMENT = TCS.ID WHERE TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY TCSS.CREATE_TIME DESC, TCSSD."DATE"

SELECT TCSS.ID TCSS_ID, TCSS.COMPANY_ID TCSS_COMPANY_ID, TCSS.COMPANY_NAME TCSS_COMPANY_NAME, TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID TCSS_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID TCSS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_ID TCSS_CARGO_OWNER_ID, TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_NAME TCSS_CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID TCSS_CARGO_INFO_ID, TCSS.HANDOVERLIST_ID TCSS_HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCSS.CONTRACT_ID TCSS_CONTRACT_ID, TCSS.RATE TCSS_RATE, TCSS.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS TCSS_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TCSS.AMOUNT TCSS_AMOUNT, TCSS.START_DATE TCSS_START_DATE, TCSS.END_DATE TCSS_END_DATE, TCSS.STATUS TCSS_STATUS, TCSS.REVIEW_BY TCSS_REVIEW_BY, TCSS.REVIEW_BY_NAME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCSS.REVIEW_BY_TIME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_TIME, TCSS.CREATE_BY TCSS_CREATE_BY, TCSS.CREATE_BY_NAME TCSS_CREATE_BY_NAME, TCSS.CREATE_TIME TCSS_CREATE_TIME, TCSS.UPDATE_BY TCSS_UPDATE_BY, TCSS.UPDATE_BY_NAME TCSS_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCSS.UPDATE_TIME TCSS_UPDATE_TIME, TCSS.CONTRACT_RATE_ID TCSS_CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TCSS.TAX TCSS_TAX, TCSS.TAX_AMOUNT TCSS_TAX_AMOUNT, TCSS.IS_USE_REDUCE TCSS_IS_USE_REDUCE, TCSS.IS_FINAL TCSS_IS_FINAL, TCSS.REDUCE_AMOUNT TCSS_REDUCE_AMOUNT, TCSSD.ID TCSSD_ID, TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID TCSSD_STORAGE_SETTLE_ID, TCSSD."DATE" TCSSD_DATE, TCSSD.TON TCSSD_TON, TCSSD.BILLABLE_TON TCSSD_BILLABLE_TON, TCSSD.IN_TON TCSSD_IN_TON, TCSSD.OUT_TON TCSSD_OUT_TON, TCSSD.AMOUNT TCSSD_AMOUNT, TCSSD.TAX_AMOUNT TCSSD_TAX_AMOUNT FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS JOIN T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL TCSSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID WHERE TCSS.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_FINAL, STATEMENT_BY, STATEMENT_BY_NAME, STATEMENT_TIME, REVIEW_BY, REVIEW_BY_NAME, REVIEW_TIME, CONFIRM_BY, CONFIRM_BY_NAME, CONFIRM_TIME, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TAX_INVOICE_CODE, TAX_INVOICE_NAME, RECEIPT_REMARK, REJECT_BY, REJECT_BY_NAME, REJECT_TIME, REJECT_REASON, BONDED_AREA_TON) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isFinal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statementByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{confirmBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{confirmByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{settlementBasisCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementBasisName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxInvoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxInvoiceName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiptRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rejectBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rejectByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rejectTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{rejectReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bondedAreaTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL})

INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL(ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, INVOICE_NUMBER, INVOICE_AMOUNT, BUSINESS_ID, RATE_ID, IS_DERIVED, TRATE_ITEM_ID, PREFERENTIAL_RATE, NUMBER2, TRATE_ID) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statement, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceContentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serviceContentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{number, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{invoiceNumber, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{invoiceAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{businessId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isDerived, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trateItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{preferentialRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{number2, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{trateId, jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: UPDATE T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REVIEW_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REVIEW_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REVIEW_BY_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REJECT_BY = NULL, REJECT_BY_NAME = NULL, REJECT_TIME = NULL, REJECT_REASON = NULL WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT TCS.ID, TCS.COMPANY_ID, TCS.COMPANY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_NO, TCS.CUSTOMER_ID, TCS.CUSTOMER_NAME, TCS.TYPE, TCS.TRUST_ID, TCS.TRUST_CARGO_ID, TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCS.CARGO_CODE, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TCS.TRADE_TYPE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_DATE, TCS.STATUS, TCS.REMARK, TCS.CREATE_BY, TCS.CREATE_BY_NAME, TCS.CREATE_TIME, TCS.UPDATE_BY, TCS.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCS.UPDATE_TIME, TCS.IS_FINAL, TCS.STATEMENT_BY, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_TIME, TCS.REVIEW_BY, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCS.REVIEW_TIME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_TIME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_CODE, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_NAME, TCS.RECEIPT_REMARK FROM T_COST_STATEMENT TCS JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT WHERE TCS.TYPE = '50' AND TCSD.BUSINESS_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TCS.ID, TCS.COMPANY_ID, TCS.COMPANY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_NO, TCS.CUSTOMER_ID, TCS.CUSTOMER_NAME, TCS.TYPE, TCS.TRUST_ID, TCS.TRUST_CARGO_ID, TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCS.CARGO_CODE, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TCS.TRADE_TYPE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_DATE, TCS.STATUS, TCS.REMARK, TCS.CREATE_BY, TCS.CREATE_BY_NAME, TCS.CREATE_TIME, TCS.UPDATE_BY, TCS.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCS.UPDATE_TIME, TCS.IS_FINAL, TCS.STATEMENT_BY, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_TIME, TCS.REVIEW_BY, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCS.REVIEW_TIME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_TIME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_CODE, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_NAME, TCS.RECEIPT_REMARK
mapper.delete: UPDATE T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REVIEW_BY = NULL, REVIEW_BY_NAME = NULL, REVIEW_BY_TIME = NULL WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT TCS.ID, TCS.COMPANY_ID, TCS.COMPANY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_NO, TCS.CUSTOMER_ID, TCS.CUSTOMER_NAME, TCS.TYPE, TCS.TRUST_ID, TCS.TRUST_CARGO_ID, TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCS.CARGO_CODE, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TCS.TRADE_TYPE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_DATE, TCS.STATUS, TCS.REMARK, TCS.CREATE_BY, TCS.CREATE_BY_NAME, TCS.CREATE_TIME, TCS.UPDATE_BY, TCS.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCS.UPDATE_TIME, TCS.IS_FINAL, TCS.STATEMENT_BY, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_TIME, TCS.REVIEW_BY, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCS.REVIEW_TIME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_TIME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_CODE, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_NAME, TCS.RECEIPT_REMARK FROM T_COST_STATEMENT TCS WHERE TCS.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select DISTINCT NVL(TDSD.BERTH_NAME, '') FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC TDSD where (TDSD.DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME = '靠泊' OR TDSD.DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME = '移泊') and TDSD.BERTH_NAME is not null AND TDSD.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId}

SELECT TCSS.ID "tcssId", TCSS.COMPANY_ID "tcssCompanyId", TCSS.COMPANY_NAME "tcssCompanyName", TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID "tcssShipvoyageId", TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID "tcssShipvoyageItemId", TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_ID "tcssCargoOwnerId", TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "tcssCargoOwnerName", TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID "tcssCargoInfoId", TCSS.HANDOVERLIST_ID "tcssHandoverlistId", TCSS.CONTRACT_ID "tcssContractId", TCSS.RATE "tcssRate", TCSS.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS "tcssFreeStorageDays", TCSS.AMOUNT "tcssAmount", TCSS.START_DATE "tcssStartDate", TCSS.END_DATE "tcssEndDate", TCSS.STATUS "tcssStatus", TCSS.REVIEW_BY "tcssReviewBy", TCSS.REVIEW_BY_NAME "tcssReviewByName", TCSS.REVIEW_BY_TIME "tcssReviewByTime", TCSS.CREATE_BY "tcssCreateBy", TCSS.CREATE_BY_NAME "tcssCreateByName", TCSS.CREATE_TIME "tcssCreateTime", TCSS.UPDATE_BY "tcssUpdateBy", TCSS.UPDATE_BY_NAME "tcssUpdateByName", TCSS.UPDATE_TIME "tcssUpdateTime", TCSS.CONTRACT_RATE_ID "tcssContractRateId", TCSS.TAX "tcssTax", TCSS.TAX_AMOUNT "tcssTaxAmount", TCSS.IS_USE_REDUCE "tcssIsUseReduce", TCSS.IS_FINAL "tcssIsFinal", TCSS.REDUCE_AMOUNT "tcssReduceAmount", TCSSD.ID "tcssdId", TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID "tcssdStorageSettleId", TCSSD."DATE" "tcssdDate", TCSSD.TON "tcssdTon", TCSSD.BILLABLE_TON "tcssdBillableTon", TCSSD.IN_TON "tcssdInTon", TCSSD.OUT_TON "tcssdOutTon", TCSSD.AMOUNT "tcssdAmount", TCSSD.TAX_AMOUNT "tcssdTaxAmount", TBC.CONTACT_NO "tbcContractNo", DECODE(TCSS.STATUS, '10', '1', TCS.STATUS) "tcsdStatus", DECODE(TCSS.STATUS, '10', '已结算', DECODE(TCS.STATUS, '30', '计费审核', '31', '商务确认', '40', '部分开票', '50', '已开票')) "tcsdStatementStatusLabel", TCS.ID TCS_ID FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS JOIN T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL TCSSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TCSS.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSD.BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCSD.STATEMENT = TCS.ID WHERE TCSS.ID = #{storageSettleId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY TCSS.CREATE_TIME DESC, TCSSD."DATE"

select CASE WHEN TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID IS NOT NULL THEN DECODE(nvl(max(IS_FINAL),0),'0','20','1','30') ELSE '10' END from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI left join T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS on TBCI.ID = TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID where TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} group by TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID

SELECT '库场使用费' FEE_NAME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TBC.CONTACT_NO, case when TDS.SHIP_NAME is not null then TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE end SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE , TCSD.AMOUNT AMOUNT, TCSD."NUMBER" "number", TCSD.RATE RATE, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME REVIEW_NAME, TCS.CREATE_TIME REVIEW_TIME, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME STATEMENT_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME CONFIRM_NAME, TBCi.COMPANY_NAME , TCSS.IS_FINAL, case when TCSS.IS_FINAL != '1' then '本次结算为预结算，完货后进行最终结算，多退少补。' end REMARK
FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TCSS.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSD.BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCSD.STATEMENT = TCS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID
TCS.TYPE = '50' AND TCS.ID IS NOT NULL AND TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID IN
#{id}

SELECT CASE WHEN to_char(TCSD.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME) IS NULL THEN '包干费' ELSE '包干费' || '(' || to_char(SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME) || ')' END FEE_NAME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TBC.CONTACT_NO, TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE, TCSD.AMOUNT AMOUNT, TCSD."NUMBER" "number", TCSD.RATE RATE, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME REVIEW_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME STATEMENT_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME CONFIRM_NAME, TCS.REVIEW_TIME REVIEW_TIME, case when TCS.IS_FINAL != '1' then '本次结算为预结算，完货后进行最终结算，多退少补。' end REMARK
FROM (SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST UNION SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER) TBH LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID = TBH.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TBC.ID = TCSD.CONTRACT_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID
TCS.ID IS NOT NULL AND TCS.TYPE IN ('10','20') AND TBH.ID IN
#{id}

SELECT TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME FEE_NAME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, CASE WHEN to_char(TCS.CARGO_NAME) IS NULL THEN to_char(TBCI.CARGO_NAME) ELSE to_char(TCS.CARGO_NAME) END CARGO_NAME, TBC.CONTACT_NO, TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE, SUM(TCSD.AMOUNT) AMOUNT, SUM(TCSD."NUMBER") "number", MAX(TCSD.RATE) RATE, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME REVIEW_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME STATEMENT_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME CONFIRM_NAME
FROM T_MISC_BILLING TMB LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCS.ID = TMB.STATEMENT_ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TBC.ID = TCSD.CONTRACT_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_RATE TBR ON TBR.ID = TCSD.RATE_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBCI.ID = TMB.CARGO_INFO_ID
TCS.ID IS NOT NULL AND TMB.CARGO_INFO_ID IN
#{id}
GROUP BY TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME , TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TBC.CONTACT_NO, TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, CASE WHEN to_char(TCS.CARGO_NAME) IS NULL THEN to_char(TBCI.CARGO_NAME) ELSE to_char(TCS.CARGO_NAME) END

select TBC.TIN, TBC.BANK, TBC.BANK_ACCOUNT, TBC.TELEPHONE_NUMBER, TBC.CONTACT, TBC.ADDRESS, TBC.CONTACT_NUMBER, TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CUSTOMER TBC ON TBC.ID = TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID where TBCI.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select ID,TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE from T_BUS_CUSTOMER where id = #{customerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select sum(TON) from T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST where CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo",TBCMD.MIX_WEIGHT "mixWeight",TBCMD.CARGO_INFO_ID "cargoInfoId" , TBCMD.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS "freeStorageDays",TBCMD.REMAIN_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS "remainFreeStorageDays", TBC.CONTACT_NO "contactNo",TBCMR.MIX_WEIGHT "allMixWeight" from T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL TBCMD left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI on TBCMD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID left join T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC on tbc.id = TBCMD.CONTRACT_ID left join T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR on TBCMD.MIX_RECORD_ID = TBCMR.ID where TBCMR.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
